consultations.phoneNote: You will be contacted at the selected time. Please make sure your phone is available at the specified time.
consultations.chatNote: The doctor will reply on chat through the app at the specified time. Make sure to enable notifications.

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Browse Fouady services through interactive horizontal cards, then open any service to view details and book directly.
servicesPage.browseHintTitle: Swipe left and right to explore services
servicesPage.browseHintText: Each section contains a group of services. Tap any card to view full details and continue booking easily.
servicesPage.detailHint: You can book this service directly from the reservations page.

branchesPage.title: Branches
branchesPage.swipeHintTitle: Swipe left and right to explore branches
branchesPage.swipeHintText: Each section contains its related branches or units. Tap any card to view photos, details, and location information easily.
branchesPage.locationHint: Tap the button above to open the location directly in Google Maps and get directions.
branchesPage.morePhotos: You can browse through branch photos when available.
branchesPage.openInMapsHint: Get directions via the Maps app

educationPage.title: Education
educationPage.browseHintText: Tap any section to explore its available articles and videos.
educationPage.comingSoon: Article content will be added soon...

instructionsPage.title: Instructions
instructionsPage.browseHintText: Tap any card to view its instructions clearly and in an organized way before your visit to the center.
instructionsPage.bottomNote: Please follow the instructions relevant to your condition or required examination. If you have any questions, you can contact the center before your visit.

sharePage.title: Share
sharePage.browseHintText: Choose the best way to send or copy the app link, and you can also install the app on your device from the install tab.
sharePage.inviteMessage: Join Fouady app using the following link: {{link}}
sharePage.whatsappText: Send the app link directly through WhatsApp.
sharePage.telegramText: Share the app link through Telegram.
sharePage.copyText: Copy the link and share it in any way you prefer.
sharePage.installSubtitle: Add the app to your home screen or desktop for faster access anytime.
sharePage.installAvailable: Installation is available on this device
sharePage.alreadyInstalled: The app is already installed on this device
sharePage.installReady: You can add the app to the home screen or desktop
sharePage.androidStep2: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen
sharePage.androidStep3: Confirm installation to add the app
sharePage.desktopStep1: Click the install icon in the address bar
sharePage.desktopStep2: Or open the browser menu and choose Install app
sharePage.desktopStep3: Confirm to add the app to your desktop
sharePage.installHint: If the install button does not appear, use the device-specific steps below.
sharePage.installBottomNote: Installation steps may vary slightly depending on the device or browser, but the final result is quick and easy access to the app.

teamPage.title: Our Team

beforeVisit.title: Before Visit
beforeVisit.subtitle: Prepare for your child's visit with ease
beforeVisit.intro: Choose the type of examination to view the appropriate instructions before visiting Fouady Center.
beforeVisit.imagesHint: Tap any image to view it in full size

echo.title: Echo Examination
echo.shortDesc: Ultrasound examination of your child's heart

ecg.title: Electrocardiogram (ECG)
ecg.shortDesc: Recording of the heart's electrical activity

holter.title: Holter Examination
holter.shortDesc: Continuous heart rate recording for 24-72 hours

bring.title: What to Bring?
bring.shortDesc: Checklist of everything you need to bring

bring.intro: Make sure to bring the following items on the day of the visit to facilitate the examination process:
items: Child's ID card or birth certificate when needed.
Health insurance card or referral letter, if available.
List of current medications and dosages.
Any questions or observations you want to discuss with the doctor.

reach.intro: Choose the nearest branch to learn the address and directions.

branches.name: Tanta Branch
branches.address: In front of the train station - Ibn El-Hetta Tower - 2nd Floor
branches.directions: Next to Tanta main train station, easily accessible from the main road.

branches.name: Benha Branch
branches.address: In front of Children Specialized Hospital - Building 21, 3rd Floor
branches.directions: Directly in front of the Children's Specialized Hospital.

branches.name: Mahalla Branch
branches.address: El-Bandar Square next to Helwany Misr El-Saeedy - 4th Floor
branches.directions: In El-Bandar Square, directly next to Helwany Misr El-Saeedy.

journey.title: Journey
journey.subtitle: Real stories from our hero children's journeys
journey.intro: Watch real journeys of children who overcame the crisis and became heroes. Through sharing, our knowledge and experience have grown.
journey.shareDesc: Do you have a success story with Fouady Center? We'd love to hear it.

hero.title: Why Fouady?
hero.message: Specialized pediatric cardiac care that combines medical expertise, diagnostic accuracy, and close family follow-up.

videoSection.title: Get to Know Us Better
videoSection.subtitle: An introductory video about Fouady Center and our services

specialty.title: Our Precise Specialty
specialty.desc: We specialize in diagnosing and following up heart diseases in children and newborns.
items: Echo examination for children and newborns
Follow-up of congenital and acquired cases
Cardiac services at branches and external units

team.title: Specialized Medical Team
team.desc: Doctors, technicians, and a reporting team working in pediatric cardiology.

reports.title: Precise Report Review
reports.desc: Every report goes through organized review stages to ensure accuracy and quality before issuance.
steps: Sending the report to family and doctor

branches.title: Service Close to the Family
branches.desc: Multiple branches and external units to facilitate access to specialized service.
items: Services in hospitals and nurseries when needed

experience.title: Comfortable Experience for Child and Parent
experience.desc: We ensure your visit is clear, calm, and organized from booking to receiving the report.
items: Team to assist family during examination

education.title: Awareness & Education
education.desc: We believe knowledge is part of care.
items: Information before and after the visit
Fouady Academy and scientific training when needed

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What distinguishes us in our journey with your child

items.title: Continuous Follow-up
items.desc: We're with you before and after the examination

cta.title: Start Your Journey with Fouady
cta.subtitle: We are here for your child every step of the way
